title: kubeadm join phase — Options
text:
-h, --help
help for wait-control-plane
help for wait-control-plane

--rootfs string
The path to the 'real' host root filesystem. This will cause kubeadm to chroot into the provided path.
The path to the 'real' host root filesystem. This will cause kubeadm to chroot into the provided path.

kubeadm init
to bootstrap a Kubernetes control-plane node
kubeadm join
to connect a node to the cluster
kubeadm reset
to revert any changes made to this host by
kubeadm init
or
kubeadm join
kubeadm alpha
to try experimental functionality
